titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Human Ecology Field Study Office records23-22-2830
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-07-31 00:03:06 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Human Ecology Field Study Office records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Human Ecology. Field Study Office

did.abstract: Annual reports, Field and International Study Program files, Field Study Committee minutes, long-range plans, grant proposals and logs, course listings, Five Year Plan, and International Educational Committee minutes.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Annual reports, Field and International Study Program files, Field Study Committee minutes, long-range plans, grant proposals and logs, course listings, Five Year Plan, and International Educational Committee minutes. Parts of this collection used to make up collection #23-2-2704

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Human Ecology Field Study Office records, #23-22-2830. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Field Study Office was established in1972 and it put students. classroom learning into action, working with community agencies.
